Centurion Parugon:
Well, maybe I am overreacting. But I've heard that the northern port of Elmore has begun to freeze over. And the weather has been so strange lately...
It all reminds me of the story about Eternal Winter. It's an old Orcish legend that is passed from generation to generation. According to his story, in the future the cold will triumph and the whole world will be covered in snow. And when all hope is gone, the God of Fire Pa'agrio will descend from heaven and bring the warmth of flame with him.
